'''tanate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knightly|knightly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-n-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knightly|knightly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tanate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:tanate|tanate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tanatesher|tanatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tanatesherĂ«m|tanatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tanatero|tanatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tanateshĂ«|tanateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tanateshĂ«m|tanateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitanatero|gokitanatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitanateshĂ«|gokitanateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitanateshĂ«m|gokitanateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotanankerom|gotanankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotanankeshĂ«|gotanankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotanankeshĂ«m|gotanankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotanankeya|gotanankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tanaterom|tanaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tanatemu|tanatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tanateya|tanateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitanaterom|gokitanaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitanatemu|gokitanatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitanateya|gokitanateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:tananate|tananate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tananatesher|tananatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tananatesherĂ«m|tananatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tananatero|tananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tananateshĂ«|tananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tananateshĂ«m|tananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitananatero|gokitananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitananateshĂ«|gokitananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitananateshĂ«m|gokitananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotananankerom|gotananankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotananankeshĂ«|gotananankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotananankeshĂ«m|gotananankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotananankeya|gotananankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tananaterom|tananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tananatemu|tananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tananateya|tananateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitananaterom|gokitananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitananatemu|gokitananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitananateya|gokitananateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:tĂŠnĂŠte|tĂŠnĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tĂŠnĂŠtesher|tĂŠnĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m|tĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠnĂŠtero|tĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|tĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|tĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠnĂŠtero|gokitĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|gokitĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|gokitĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotĂŠnĂŠnkerom|gotĂŠnĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«|gotĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gotĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotĂŠnĂŠnkeya|gotĂŠnĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠnĂŠterom|tĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠnĂŠtemu|tĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tĂŠnĂŠteya|tĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠnĂŠterom|gokitĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠnĂŠtemu|gokitĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitĂŠnĂŠteya|gokitĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:tafnafte|tafnafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tafnaftesher|tafnaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafnaftesherĂ«m|tafnaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafnaftero|tafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tafnafteshĂ«|tafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafnafteshĂ«m|tafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafnaftero|gokitafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitafnafteshĂ«|gokitafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafnafteshĂ«m|gokitafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotafnafnkerom|gotafnafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotafnafnkeshĂ«|gotafnafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotafnafnkeshĂ«m|gotafnafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotafnafnkeya|gotafnafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafnafterom|tafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafnaftemu|tafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tafnafteya|tafnafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafnafterom|gokitafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafnaftemu|gokitafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitafnafteya|gokitafnafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
